# SBG Arogya Plus

> A modern Hospital Management & Healthcare ERP platform for multi-specialty hospitals — OPD, IPD, pharmacy, lab, billing, insurance, HR, and analytics in one integrated workspace.

SBG Arogya Plus is a secure, role-based hospital information system used by clinicians, nurses, pharmacists, lab technicians, accountants, and administrators. The product surface is sign-in only; the pages below are the public entry points.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product landing — redirects authenticated users to the dashboard.
- [Sign in](/login): Sign in or request access to the hospital workspace.
